meta.note: Conservative, well-documented edges only; each carries a source. Direction = provider -> consumer (supply_chain, customer) or owner -> owned (ownership); partnership is undirected. Many real links to non-EU/out-of-universe entities (TSMC, Microsoft, NVIDIA, SES, Hispasat) are omitted because the counterparty is not a node here.

types.supply_chain: source supplies a critical input to target (e.g. Zeiss SMT optics -> ASML)
types.ownership: source owns / controls (a stake in) target (e.g. Iliad -> Scaleway)
types.partnership: joint venture, consortium or strategic partnership (undirected)
types.customer: source provides product/service that target depends on (stack dependency)

relationships.note: Carl Zeiss SMT is the sole supplier of the projection optics at the heart of ASML's DUV and EUV/High-NA lithography scanners.
ASML holds a 24.9% minority stake in Carl Zeiss SMT (€1bn, 2016/17), deepening the EUV optics partnership.
Siltronic supplies hyperpure silicon wafers to major chipmakers under long-term contracts; Infineon is among named customers.
STMicroelectronics uses Soitec's FD-SOI / SOI engineered substrates; the two collaborate closely under France's IPCEI/France 2030 programmes.
STACKIT offers Aleph Alpha's PhariaAI on its sovereign cloud (Schwarz Digits TECH Conference, May 2025) — pairing German sovereign cloud with a German sovereign model provider.
ASML led Mistral AI's Sept-2025 Series C (~€1.3bn of €1.7bn) for an ~11% stake and a strategic-committee seat — anchoring a European AI/semiconductor value chain.
Mistral AI and Helsing partnered (Feb 2025) to build vision-language-action models for Helsing's defence platforms.
Mistral AI uses Scaleway's (iliad) GPU sovereign-cloud infrastructure for training/serving.
OVHcloud offers sovereign-cloud deployment of Mistral models (reference architecture for Mistral Large) under EU jurisdiction.
Jenoptik supplies precision micro-optics/photonic subsystems used in semiconductor lithography toolchains (ASML/Zeiss ecosystem).
CANCOM integrated STACKIT's sovereign-cloud portfolio into its Cloud Marketplace (Nov 2025).
